raw_source.title: [HK/remote]SynFutures Company is looking for Senior Smart Contract Developer
raw_source.body:
## About
https://www.synfutures.com/
## Responsibilities
Job Responsibilities:
Designing, modeling, implementing, and maintaining a fully on-chain derivatives DEX.
## Requirements
Job Requirements:
1. Haveain-depthunderstandingofblockchaintechnology,smartcontract development, and DeFi protocols.
2. With backgrounds in mathematics or financial engineering are highly desirable.
3. Minimum of 3 years of experience in building and deploying production-level Solidity contracts is required.
4. Proficiency in Solidity is required, along with expertise in at least one other non-smart-contract language, preferably JavaScript/TypeScript or Python.
5. Comprehensive knowledge of the Uniswap V2 protocol is essential, while familiarity with Uniswap V3 will be considered a significant advantage.
6. StayupdatedwiththelatestDeFitechnologyandindustrytrends,along with a solid understanding of the economic principles behind mainstream DeFi products.
7. Excellent communication and teamwork abilities, robust logical thinking skills, adherence to good coding practices, and proficiency in technical documentation are essential.
## Nice to Haves

## Job Nature

- Full-time or not: full time
- Remote or not: remote/HK based

## Salary and Benefits
Developers love job postings with accurate salary ranges.
This item must be filled in, otherwise the Rebase official account and other media channels may not be forwarded.
$6K+

## Work Location
HK/remote
## Contact
hiring@synfutures.com
